Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025 Section 1

CHURCH (MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS)
MEASURE (ISLE OF MAN) 2025
Approved by Sodor and Man Diocesan Synod: 10 July 2024
Approved by Tynwald: 22 January 2025
Received Royal Assent: 8 July 2025
Announced to Tynwald: 14 July 2025
A MEASURE enacted pursuant to the Church Legislation Procedure Act 1993 to
extend to the Isle of Man the Church of England (Miscellaneous Provisions)
Measure 2024; to repeal obsolete provisions relating to sequestration; and for
connected purposes.
1 Short Title
The short title of this Measure is the Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure
(Isle of Man) 2025.
2 Commencement
(1) This Measure comes into operation on such day or days as the Bishop may
by order appoint.1
(2) An order under subsection (1) may include such transitional provisions as
appear to the Bishop to be necessary or expedient for the purposes of the
order.
3 Extension of Church of England (Miscellaneous Provisions)
Measure 2024 to the Isle of Man
The following provisions of the Church of England (Miscellaneous Provisions)
Measure 2024 extend to the Island subject to the exceptions, adaptations and
modifications specified in Schedule 1 —
section 3 (safeguarding code revisions);
section 6 (delegation of episcopal functions);
section 9 (judges: appointment etc.);
c SM 2 of 2025 Page 5

Section 4 Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025
section 11 (disciplinary proceedings etc.);
section 12 (live broadcast of proceedings);
section 13 (care of churches);
section 17 (elections under Church Representation Rules);
section 20 and Schedule 2 (meetings);
section 22 (short title etc.).
4 Amendment of Churchwardens Measure
In section 3 (interpretation) of the Churchwardens Measure (Isle of Man) 2013 —
(a) at the beginning insert «(1)»;
(b) at the end insert, —
«(2) A reference in this Measure to a meeting of parishioners includes a
reference to a meeting which persons may attend, speak at, vote in
or otherwise participate in without any, or without all, of the
persons being together in the same place.
(3) A reference in this Measure to the place where a meeting of
parishioners is to be held includes a reference to more than one
place, including electronic, digital or virtual locations, web
addresses or conference call telephone numbers.
(4) A person is to be regarded for the purposes of this Measure as
present at a meeting of parishioners at any given time if the person
is at that time able to hear and be heard by, and where practicable
to see and be seen by, the other persons present.
(5) A reference in this Measure to being present at a meeting of
parishioners includes a reference to being present by electronic
means, including by telephone conference, video conference, live
webcast or live interactive streaming.».
5 Sequestration
(1) The enactments specified in Part 1 of Schedule 2 are amended in
accordance with that Part.
(2) The enactments specified in Part 2 of Schedule 2 are repealed to the extent
specified in column 2 of that Part.
6 Patronage
In paragraph 7 of Schedule 4 to the Capacity Act 2023, for the words from the
beginning to “inserted” substitute «In Schedule 1 to the Patronage Measure (Isle
of Man) 1997, in section 5 of the Patronage (Benefices) Measure 1986, after
subsection (3) insert».
Page 6 SM 2 of 2025 c

Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025 SCHEDULE 1
SCHEDULE 1
MODIFICATIONS ETC. OF CHURCH OF ENGLAND (MISCELLANEOUS
PROVISIONS) MEASURE 2024
[Section 3]
Delegation of episcopal functions
1. In section 6(3), for the words from “omit” onwards substitute «omit the words
from “except” to the end».
Judges: appointment etc.
2. Omit section 9(1) and (2).
Disciplinary proceedings
3. (1) In section 11(1), in the new item 8, omit “judicial” (in each place).
(2) In section 11(2), in the inserted note 1, for “Civil Procedure Rules relating
to judicial review” substitute «the Rules of the High Court of Justice
relating to review of decisions».
(3) In section 11(5), omit paragraphs (b) and (e).
Live broadcast of proceedings
4. In section 12, in the new section 93A(4), for the words from “a breach of” onwards
substitute «a contempt of court».
Care of churches
5. (1) Omit section 13(1).
(2) In section 13(2), for “that Measure” substitute «the Ecclesiastical
Jurisdiction and Care of Churches Measure 2018».
(3) Omit section 13(3) and (4).
(4) In section 13(5), in the new section 78(2A), for “77(7)(a) to (j)” substitute
«77(7)(d) to (j)».
Elections under Church Representation Rules
6. (1) Omit section 17(1).
(2) In section 17(2), for “those Rules” substitute «the Church Representation
Rules».
c SM 2 of 2025 Page 7

SCHEDULE 1 Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025
Meetings
7. (1) Omit section 20(2).
(2) In Schedule 2 —
(a) in paragraph 1, in the new rule 83A(6), omit sub-paragraph (a);
(b) in paragraph 3, for “subsection (9)” substitute «subsection (8)»;
(c) omit paragraphs 4 to 10.
Short title etc.
8. (1) In section 22(2), omit paragraphs (c) to (g) and (j) to (k).
(2) Omit section 22(3) to (9) and (12).
Page 8 SM 2 of 2025 c

Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025 SCHEDULE 2
SCHEDULE 2
SEQUESTRATION
[Section 5]
PART 1
AMENDMENTS
Church Act 1969
1. For paragraph 5B of Schedule 1 substitute —
«5B. In section 72 of the Measure (which relates to the occupation of a
parsonage house) —
(a) in subsection (2), omit the words from “and such part”
onwards; and
(b) omit subsection (3).».
Ecclesiastical Offices (Terms of Service) Measure (Isle of Man) 2012
2. In paragraph 15 of the Schedule, in paragraph 3(1) of the inserted Schedule 1A,
for “his, her or their” (in both places) substitute «his or her».2
Mission and Pastoral Measure (Isle of Man) 2012
3. (1) In section 29(11), after paragraph (c) insert «or».
(2) In paragraph 3(4) of Schedule 3, for “, parochial church council or
sequestrators” substitute «or parochial church council».
c SM 2 of 2025 Page 9

SCHEDULE 2 Church (Miscellaneous Provisions) Measure (Isle of Man) 2025
PART 2
REPEALS
Short title Extent of repeal
Bankruptcy Code 1892. Section 35.
Church Act 1969. Sections 5 and 7.
Patronage Measure (Isle of In Schedule 1, in section 20 of the Patronage (Benefices)
Man) 1997. Measure 1986, paragraph (b).
Ecclesiastical Offices (Terms In paragraph 15 of the Schedule, in the inserted
of Service) Measure (Isle of Schedule 1A —
Man) 2012. (a) in paragraph 2(2), the words “or sequestrators”; and
(b) in paragraph 3(1), the words “or the sequestrators”.
Mission and Pastoral In section 29(11), paragraph (e) and the preceding “and”.
Measure (Isle of Man) 2012. Section 30(1), (2) and (5).
Schedule 5.
